narrative:
York Township has 3,650 registered voters, with 62.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.5 percentage points.
